mnemonics: UNI-gram: UNI-versal building blocks - single words predict probability independently
keyPoints: Unigrams are the simplest n-grams using single word units
They calculate probability as frequency of individual words
They ignore word order and context completely
commonMistakes: Assuming unigrams capture word order (they don't)
Forgetting to handle unseen words with smoothing techniques
Confusing unigrams with higher-order n-grams like bigrams/trigrams
